title: Staff portal card navigates to Staff Login
description: Verifies the landing page shows the Staff portal entry and routes to the Staff login page from the Staff portal button.

title: Agent portal card navigates to Agent Login
description: Verifies the landing page routes to the Agent login page from the Agent portal button.

title: Activate client account successfully and reach client login
description: Verifies a first-time client can verify identity with activation code + policy number, set password and security question, and is redirected to the client login (or is auto-logged in).

steps.description: Type "VALID-ACTIVATION-CODE" into the activation code field
Type "POLICY-000001" into the policy number field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the new password field
Select "What is your mother's maiden name?" from the security question dropdown
Type "TestAnswer" into the security answer field

title: Show error for invalid activation code during verification
description: Verifies an invalid activation code is rejected with a visible error message and does not proceed to password setup.

steps.description: Type "INVALID-CODE" into the activation code field
Type "POLICY-000001" into the policy number field
Verify text "invalid activation code" is visible
Verify text "Set password" is not visible

title: Password length validation prevents activation (shorter than 8 chars)
description: Verifies inline validation appears and activation is blocked when the password is too short.

steps.description: Type "VALID-ACTIVATION-CODE" into the activation code field
Type "POLICY-000001" into the policy number field
Type "short7" into the new password field

title: Required fields validation when verifying without inputs
description: Verifies verification cannot proceed when activation code and policy number are missing and required-field messaging is shown.

steps.description: Verify text "Set password" is not visible

title: Prevent activation if security question is not selected
description: Verifies activation is blocked and a visible validation message is shown when the security question is not selected.

steps.description: Type "VALID-ACTIVATION-CODE" into the activation code field
Type "POLICY-000001" into the policy number field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the new password field

title: Prevent activation if security answer is empty
description: Verifies activation is blocked and a visible validation message is shown when the security answer is missing.

steps.description: Type "VALID-ACTIVATION-CODE" into the activation code field
Type "POLICY-000001" into the policy number field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the new password field
Select "What is your mother's maiden name?" from the security question dropdown

title: Invalid policy number shows error during verification
description: Verifies a mismatched or invalid policy number is rejected with a visible error and does not proceed to password setup.

steps.description: Type "VALID-ACTIVATION-CODE" into the activation code field
Type "POLICY-DOES-NOT-EXIST" into the policy number field
Verify text "Set password" is not visible

title: Stay on enrollment page and show error when activation fails after Verify
description: Verifies that if activation submission fails (e.g., server-side validation) the user stays on the enrollment page and sees a visible error message.

steps.description: Type "VALID-ACTIVATION-CODE" into the activation code field
Type "POLICY-000001" into the policy number field
Type "ValidPass123!" into the new password field
Select "What is your mother's maiden name?" from the security question dropdown
Type "TestAnswer" into the security answer field

title: Staff dashboard loads and shows KPI cards and charts
description: Verifies the staff dashboard renders core KPI cards and main charts after successful login.

title: Apply date range filter updates dashboard view
description: Verifies changing the date range filter updates the dashboard’s visible state (charts/KPIs section refresh indicators or updated content).

steps.description: Select "Last 30 days" from the date range options
Verify element "Revenue trend chart" is visible

title: Apply policy status filter updates dashboard view
description: Verifies selecting a policy status filter reflects on the dashboard and keeps charts visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Policy breakdown chart" is visible

title: Apply branch filter updates dashboard view
description: Verifies selecting a branch filter reflects on the dashboard and preserves KPI visibility.

steps.description: Select the first available branch option from the branch list

title: Combine multiple filters (date range + status + branch) and confirm dashboard remains consistent
description: Verifies multiple filters can be applied together without breaking the dashboard view and charts remain displayed.

steps.description: Select "This month" from the date range options

title: Agent-scoped view: dashboard shows agent-only data indicator or labeling
description: Verifies that when logged in as an agent user, the dashboard reflects agent-scoped context (visible indicator/labeling) and still renders KPIs.

steps.description: Verify element "Revenue trend chart" is visible

title: Open sidebar from Staff dashboard and navigate to Clients
description: Verifies the hamburger menu opens the staff sidebar and the Clients item navigates to the Clients page.

title: Open sidebar from Staff dashboard and navigate to Policies
description: Verifies the Policies navigation item is available in the sidebar and routes correctly.

title: Open sidebar from Staff dashboard and navigate to Claims
description: Verifies the Claims navigation item is visible and routes correctly from the sidebar.

title: Open sidebar from Staff dashboard and navigate to Reports
description: Verifies the Reports navigation item is present and routes to the Reports page.

title: Sign out from sidebar and return to landing page
description: Verifies the sidebar exposes Sign out and that signing out redirects the user to the public landing page.

title: Sidebar shows key navigation sections when opened
description: Verifies that opening the hamburger menu reveals common staff navigation items (sanity check of menu content).

title: Permission-aware menu: restricted item not visible for a limited-permission staff user
description: Verifies that a staff user who lacks a permission does not see the corresponding restricted navigation item in the sidebar.

title: Create a new policy from the staff policies list and verify detail tabs are accessible
description: Verifies a staff user can create a policy and then open the new policy to view core detail tabs.

steps.description: Click "Policies" in the staff navigation menu

title: Complete new policy form and confirm newly created policy appears in the list
description: Verifies completing the new policy form creates a policy and returns to a list that includes the newly created record.

steps.description: Click "Policies" in the staff navigation menu
Select an existing client from the Client selector

title: Filter policies by status and verify filtered results are shown
description: Verifies policy list status filtering (e.g., Active) updates the visible list content.

steps.description: Click "Policies" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Active" from the Status filter dropdown

title: Attempt to create a policy with missing required fields and verify inline validation errors
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents policy creation and displays visible error messages.

steps.description: Click "Policies" in the staff navigation menu

title: Create a new claim and submit it (without uploading documents)
description: Verifies a staff user can create a new claim linked to a policy and submit it, and the claim appears in the list with status Submitted.

steps.description: Click "Claims" in the staff navigation menu

title: Create a new claim linked to a policy and submit it (no document upload due to runner limitations)
description: Verifies required claim fields can be completed, a policy can be linked, and submitting creates a claim that shows as Submitted in the list.

steps.description: Click "Claims" in the staff navigation menu
Select the first available option from the "Linked Policy" dropdown

title: Claims list filtering by status shows expected results
description: Verifies the claims list status filter can be used and the list updates to show the chosen status.

steps.description: Click "Claims" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Submitted" from the status filter dropdown

title: Create claim validation: attempt submit with missing required fields shows an error
description: Verifies required fields are enforced when creating a claim and a visible validation error is shown on submit.

steps.description: Click "Claims" in the staff navigation menu

title: Create a new product with a first version and verify the version appears under the product
description: Verifies staff can create a product, add a version with pricing and eligibility, and see the version listed under the product.

steps.description: Click the "Products" item in the main navigation

title: Save a newly created product and confirm it appears in the product list
description: Verifies the product list updates to show a newly saved product after creation.

steps.description: Click the "Products" item in the main navigation
Type "Automation Test Product" into the product name field
Type "AUTO-PROD-001" into the product code field

title: Complete product creation by saving and verifying success state on the Products page
description: Verifies saving a product results in a visible success outcome and the product becomes visible/accessible from the list.

steps.description: Click the "Products" item in the main navigation
Type "Automation Test Product" into the product name field
Type "AUTO-PROD-002" into the product code field

title: Required-field validation when creating a product without a name
description: Verifies that saving a product without a name shows a visible validation message and does not create the product.

steps.description: Click the "Products" item in the main navigation
Type "AUTO-PROD-NONAME" into the product code field

title: Required-field validation when creating a product without a code
description: Verifies that saving a product without a code shows a visible validation message and does not create the product.

steps.description: Click the "Products" item in the main navigation
Type "No Code Product" into the product name field

title: Access Finance module and view payment transactions list
description: Verifies a staff user can open the Finance module and see the payment transactions list.

steps.description: Click "Finance" in the staff navigation menu

title: View payment receipts from Finance module
description: Verifies a staff user can switch to the receipts view and see receipt information.

steps.description: Click "Finance" in the staff navigation menu

title: Create a new cashup and verify it appears in the cashups list
description: Verifies a staff user can create a cashup by filling required fields and then see it in the list.

steps.description: Click "Finance" in the staff navigation menu

title: Cashup required-field validation prevents submission
description: Verifies the cashup form shows visible validation and does not submit when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Click "Finance" in the staff navigation menu

title: View credit notes and reversal entries
description: Verifies a staff user can open the credit notes/reversals section and see related entries.

steps.description: Click "Finance" in the staff navigation menu

title: Track expenditures list is visible in Finance module
description: Verifies a staff user can open the expenditures area and see an expenditures list or empty state.

steps.description: Click "Finance" in the staff navigation menu

title: Client can view payment history on Client Payments page
description: Verifies a logged-in client can open the payments page and see the payment history section rendered.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the policy number field

title: Initiate payment flow reaches payment method selection
description: Verifies a client can start a new payment from the payments page and reach the payment method selection step.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the policy number field
Verify text "Select payment method" is visible

title: Cancel out of payment initiation returns to payments page
description: Verifies a client can back out of the initiate payment flow without submitting and returns to the payments page state.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the policy number field

title: Validation: submitting without choosing a payment method shows an error
description: Verifies the UI blocks submission until a payment method is selected and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the policy number field
Verify text "Select a payment method" is visible

title: Polling indicator appears after payment is submitted
description: Verifies that after submitting a payment, the UI indicates that status is being checked (polling/processing) instead of staying idle.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the policy number field
Select "Visa" from the payment method options
Verify text "Checking payment status" is visible

title: Run Policies report with filters and view results table
description: Verifies a staff user can select the Policies report, apply date range and filters, run it, and see a results table or a clear empty-state.

steps.description: Click "Reports" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Policies" from the report type dropdown
Select a valid start date in the date range filter
Select a valid end date in the date range filter
Select a specific branch from the branch filter dropdown
Verify the report results table is visible

title: Run Finance report with minimal required filters
description: Verifies a staff user can switch to the Finance report type, run it with a basic date range, and see the report table render.

steps.description: Click "Reports" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Finance" from the report type dropdown
Select a valid start date in the date range filter
Select a valid end date in the date range filter
Verify the report results table is visible

title: Empty-state when running a report for a date range with no data
description: Verifies the report shows a clear empty-state message when the selected date range returns no results.

steps.description: Click "Reports" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Policies" from the report type dropdown
Select a start date far in the past in the date range filter
Select an end date shortly after the start date in the date range filter

title: Export disabled or blocked when report has no data
description: Verifies export behavior when the report result is empty: the export control is disabled or the UI indicates nothing to export.

steps.description: Click "Reports" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Finance" from the report type dropdown
Select a start date far in the past in the date range filter
Select an end date shortly after the start date in the date range filter
Verify element "Export to CSV" is visible

title: Filter by Agent and rerun report updates the displayed results
description: Verifies changing the Agent filter and refreshing updates the visible report output (table renders after rerun).

steps.description: Click "Reports" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Policies" from the report type dropdown
Select a valid start date in the date range filter
Select a valid end date in the date range filter
Select a specific agent from the agent filter dropdown
Verify the report results table is visible

title: Filter by Product and Status and run report successfully
description: Verifies the report can be executed with multiple filters (product and status) and still renders results or an empty-state cleanly.

steps.description: Click "Reports" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Policies" from the report type dropdown
Select a valid start date in the date range filter
Select a valid end date in the date range filter
Select a specific product from the product filter dropdown
Select a specific status from the status filter dropdown
Verify the report results table is visible

title: Validation when date range is incomplete (only start date set)
description: Verifies the UI prevents running the report or shows a visible validation message when the date range is incomplete.

steps.description: Click "Reports" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Finance" from the report type dropdown
Select a valid start date in the date range filter

title: Validation when end date is earlier than start date
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible validation error when an invalid date range is selected.

steps.description: Click "Reports" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Policies" from the report type dropdown
Select a valid end date in the date range filter
Select a start date that is later than the end date in the date range filter
Verify text "Invalid date range" is visible

title: Create a new staff user with role and branch assignment
description: Verifies a staff user can create a new user with required details, assign a role and branch, and see the new user in the list.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu

title: Complete user creation and verify new user appears in list
description: Verifies the create-user form can be submitted successfully and the created user is visible in the user list afterward.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu

title: Submit create-user form with role and branch and see user in list
description: Verifies entering email and display name, assigning role and branch, and submitting results in the new user being listed with role badge.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu
Type "E2E UM User 01" into the display name field

title: Assign role and branch during user creation and submit
description: Verifies role assignment and branch assignment controls can be used and the form can be successfully submitted.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu
Select "Main Branch" from the branch dropdown

title: Email uniqueness validation when creating a user with an existing email
description: Verifies the UI shows a visible validation error when trying to create a user with an email that already exists.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu

title: See visible uniqueness error message for duplicate email
description: Verifies an explicit email uniqueness error message is displayed on the create-user form for a duplicate email submission.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu

title: Open an existing user row and access permission overrides
description: Verifies a staff user can open a user row/details view and reach the permission overrides section.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu
Click on the first user row in the user list

title: Toggle a permission override and save successfully
description: Verifies permission overrides can be toggled for a user and saving shows an updated visible badge/indicator.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu
Click on the first user row in the user list
Click the permission override toggle for "View Reports"

title: Verify updated permission badges appear after saving overrides
description: Verifies the user list or user details shows updated permission badges/indicators after saving permission overrides.

steps.description: Click "Users" in the staff navigation menu
Click on the first user row in the user list

title: Save organization name and primary color; verify staff login branding updates
description: Verifies tenant settings save successfully and updated branding is reflected on the staff login page.

steps.description: Click "Settings" in the staff navigation menu

title: Update organization name and save successfully
description: Verifies the organization name can be edited and saved with a visible success confirmation.

steps.description: Click "Settings" in the staff navigation menu
Fill "TS QA Org Rename" into the organization name field

title: Change primary color and save successfully
description: Verifies the primary brand color can be changed and saved.

steps.description: Click "Settings" in the staff navigation menu
Fill "#1E40AF" into the primary color field

title: Reload staff login page and verify updated organization name is visible
description: Verifies public-facing staff login reflects the updated org name after saving settings.

steps.description: Click "Settings" in the staff navigation menu
Fill "TS QA Org Branding" into the organization name field

title: Save settings with missing required organization name and verify inline error
description: Verifies required-field validation prevents saving when the organization name is cleared.

steps.description: Click "Settings" in the staff navigation menu
Fill "" into the organization name field

title: Toggle a feature flag and save successfully
description: Verifies a feature flag can be changed and persisted via the Save action.

steps.description: Click "Settings" in the staff navigation menu
Click a feature flag toggle switch

title: View audit log list shows key columns
description: Verifies the audit logs viewer loads and displays an entries list with expected visible fields.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click "Audit" or "Audit Trail" in the staff navigation

title: Audit log list displays entry details (actor, action, entity, timestamp)
description: Verifies at least one audit entry row exposes actor, action, entity identifier, and timestamp on the list view.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click "Audit" or "Audit Trail" in the staff navigation
Verify element "Audit log entries list" is visible

title: Filter audit logs by date range returns filtered results
description: Verifies applying a date range filter updates the visible audit entries list.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click "Audit" or "Audit Trail" in the staff navigation
Click the "Start date" field in the date range filter
Select an available start date from the date picker

title: Filter audit logs by date range can be fully applied (start and end)
description: Verifies selecting both start and end dates applies the filter and shows filtered entries state.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click "Audit" or "Audit Trail" in the staff navigation
Click the "End date" field in the date range filter
Select an available end date from the date picker

title: Open audit entry to view before/after change details
description: Verifies clicking an audit entry reveals a details view with before/after change information.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click "Audit" or "Audit Trail" in the staff navigation
Click the first visible audit log entry in the list

title: Audit entry details show both 'Before' and 'After' sections
description: Verifies the audit entry details view includes both sides of the change for investigation/compliance.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click "Audit" or "Audit Trail" in the staff navigation
Click the first visible audit log entry in the list

title: Date range filter with no matching entries shows empty state
description: Verifies selecting a date range that yields zero results shows a clear empty-state message.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click "Audit" or "Audit Trail" in the staff navigation
Click the "Start date" field in the date range filter
Select a far-future start date from the date picker

title: Empty state message is displayed when no audit entries are available for range
description: Verifies the audit viewer communicates 'no audit entries' when the current filter yields no rows.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click "Audit" or "Audit Trail" in the staff navigation
Wait for the audit results area to load
Verify text "No audit entries" is visible
